overall.description: A cinematic game engine render of a serene walled garden courtyard featuring a central stone fountain, lush spring vegetation, and butterflies fluttering about. The camera remains stationary throughout, capturing the tranquil atmosphere of the historic stone garden under an overcast sky.

entered.detail: circular stone fountain with water and central statue feature
circular paved stone area surrounding the central fountain
tall historic stone wall enclosing the garden with crenellations
arched doorway in the center of the back wall
lush green trees surrounding the courtyard perimeter
clusters of purple flowering plants along the left side
ornate black metal lantern post on the right side of the courtyard

segments.scene_description: A tranquil walled garden courtyard rendered in a game engine, featuring a central stone fountain surrounded by cobblestone paving. The scene is enclosed by historic stone walls with an arched gateway, surrounded by lush green trees and flowering plants. Butterflies flutter around the fountain area while the camera maintains a stationary view of the serene spring setting under an overcast sky.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a stationary, cinematic view of a tranquil walled garden courtyard that maintains a serene and unchanging atmosphere. It begins by focusing on a central stone fountain surrounded by weathered cobblestone paving under a soft, overcast sky. As the eye wanders, the scene expands to reveal historic stone walls and an arched gateway framed by lush green trees and vibrant flowering plants. The stillness is punctuated only by the gentle movement of butterflies fluttering around the fountain area before the view settles into the quietude of the spring setting.
